footer.v: 1 - Còn sử dụng, 0 - Không còn sử dụng

command.text: declare @message nvarchar(4000), @unitName nvarchar(1023) select @unitName = case when @@language = 'v' then ten_dvcs else ten_dvcs2 end from dmdvcs where ma_dvcs = @@unit select @message = 'this._unitCode=''' + @@unit + ''';this._unitName=''' + replace(replace(isnull(@unitName, ''), '\', '\\'), '''', '\''') + ''';active$FormBankAccount(this);' &WhenBankAccountBeforeEdit; select @message as message return
declare @message nvarchar(4000) select @message = 'active$FormBankAccount(this);' &WhenBankAccountBeforeEdit; select @message as message return

declare @$exists nvarchar(512), @$recordHasBeenChanged nvarchar(512) select @$exists = case when @@language = 'v' then N'Tài khoản %s đã có trong danh mục tài khoản ngân hàng.' else N'The account %s already exists.' end select @$recordHasBeenChanged = case when @@language = 'v' then N'Tài khoản %s đã được sửa hoặc xóa bởi người sử dụng khác.' else N'The account %s has been modified or deleted by another user.' end

if exists(select * from @@table where tk = @tk and ma_dvcs = @ma_dvcs) begin select 'tk' as field, replace(@$exists, '%s', rtrim(@tk)) as message return end select @datetime0 = getdate(), @datetime2 = getdate(), @user_id0 = @@userID, @user_id2 = @@userID

if not exists(select * from @@table where tk = $tk.OldValue and ma_dvcs = $ma_dvcs.OldValue) begin select 'tk' as field, replace(@$recordHasBeenChanged, '%s', rtrim($tk.OldValue)) as message return end
if @tk <> $tk.OldValue or @ma_dvcs <> $ma_dvcs.OldValue begin if exists(select * from @@table where (not (tk = $tk.OldValue and ma_dvcs = $ma_dvcs.OldValue)) and (tk = @tk and ma_dvcs = @ma_dvcs)) begin select 'tk' as field, replace(@$exists, '%s', rtrim(@tk)) as message return end end
update @@table set datetime2 = getdate(), user_id2 = @@userID where tk = @tk and ma_dvcs = @ma_dvcs

action.text: if exists(select 1 from dmnh where ma_nh = @ma_nh) begin select rtrim(ten_nh) as ten_nh, rtrim(ten_nh2) as ten_nh2, rtrim(tinh_thanh) as tinh_thanh, rtrim(dien_thoai) as dien_thoai, rtrim(fax) as fax from dmnh where ma_nh = @ma_nh return end
